arts.sum: Aston Villa are reportedly ready to make a move for Chelsea midfielder Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall as he could already be allowed to leave Stamford Bridge. The 26-year-old has struggled for playing time since joining Chelsea from Leicester City in the summer, despite having previously impressed at the King Power Stadium under Enzo Maresca.
